ddls:
CREATE TABLE "simulations" (
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each simulation */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* ID of the project the simulation belongs to */,
  "engine" TEXT /* Molecular dynamics simulation engine used (e.g., AMBER, CHARMM) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation started */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the simulation ended */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current state of the simulation (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "version" INTEGER /* Version of the simulation */,
  "input_file" TEXT /* Path or reference to the input file used for the simulation */,
  "output_file" TEXT /* Path or reference to the output file generated by the simulation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulations_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the project */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the project was created */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the project (e.g., active, completed, archived) */,
  "collaborators" TEXT /* List of user IDs collaborating on the project */,
  "tags" TEXT /* Tags for categorization and search (e.g., protein folding, molecular interactions) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simulation_parameters" (
  "parameter_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each parameter */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the parameter belongs to */,
  "parameter_name" TEXT /* Name of the parameter (e.g., time step, temperature) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the parameter */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the parameter value (e.g., fs, K) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("parameter_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simulation_parameters_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "molecular_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the interaction belongs to */,
  "molecule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the molecule involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., bond, angle, dihedral) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the interaction */,
  "description" TEXT /* Additional details about the interaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_molecular_interactions_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "energy_calculations" (
  "calculation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each calculation */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation the calculation belongs to */,
  "calculation_type" TEXT /* Type of calculation (e.g., total energy, potential energy) */,
  "value" TEXT /* Value of the calculation */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the energy value (e.g., kcal/mol) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("calculation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_energy_calculations_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, administrator) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution affiliation of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "simulation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the simulation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the simulation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the simulation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the simulation was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser or client used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_simulation_id FOREIGN KEY ("simulation_id") REFERENCES simulations ("simulation_id")
)
